title: Energizing Kenyan Buttermilk Porridge
description: This low-carb, energizing porridge combines the traditional flavors of Kenya with a unique twist using bay leaves and pickles for a burst of flavor.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Stir in the Buttermilk and Bay Leaves. Bring to a simmer and cook for about 5 minutes until thickened.
Add the Oat Flour gradually while stirring continuously to prevent lumps from forming. Cook for another minute.
Gradually stir in the Greek Yogurt, salt, and pickle relish (if using). Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
